name: NIPPON PARKING DEVELOPMENT Co.,Ltd.
summary: NIPPON PARKING DEVELOPMENT Co.,Ltd. provides consulting services for parking lot businesses in Japan. The company's operations/services comprise parking facility design and planning solutions, operations planning solutions, parking facilities operations manning services, and valet services. Its profitability management solutions consist of rent proposal report, operational profitability estimation, unused real estate assets activation, parking operation, and marketing services. In addition, the company provides cost management solutions in the fields of parking facility planning and design, facility maintenance plan, construction management, monthly facilities maintenance, and sale of parking facilities. Further, it offers parking safety improvement programs. The company serves building owners, parking facility owners, hotel business owners, store owners, property managers, asset managers, development project managers, and rental/lease businesses. NIPPON PARKING DEVELOPMENT Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
